kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=days' by value 15.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=months' by label March.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=years' by value 1995.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Cleanup Test User
Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Delete Account')]' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
kw.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Delete Account')]' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Native click failed on Delete Account; trying JS click fallback.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Account deletion confirmation not visible; continuing without failing teardown.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Delete Account link not found, skipping cleanup.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Deletes the current account if logged in.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=days' by value 15.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

Click Element

kw.msg: Text 'Account Deleted' did not appear in 15 seconds.

Text 'Account Deleted' did not appear in 15 seconds.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Cleanup Test User
Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Click Element
kw.msg: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (1210, 40). Other element would receive the click: (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.177) Stacktrace: #0 0x55627bf66a6a #1 0x55627b975ab5 #2 0x55627b9cf93b #3 0x55627b9cd572 #4 0x55627b9caab9 #5 0x55627b9c9ba7 #6 0x55627b9bdbb2 #7 0x55627b9bd4f7 #8 0x55627ba107b6 #9 0x55627b9bbcbf #10 0x55627b9bca81 #11 0x55627bf2ca64 #12 0x55627bf2f951 #13 0x55627bf1921e #14 0x55627bf3051e #15 0x55627beffbe0 #16 0x55627bf539b8 #17 0x55627bf53b88 #18 0x55627bf654de #19 0x7f5096c9caa4 #20 0x7f5096d29c6c
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (1210, 40). Other element would receive the click: (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.177) [ Message content over the limit has been removed. ] #1 0x55627b975ab5 #2 0x55627b9cf93b #3 0x55627b9cd572 #4 0x55627b9caab9 #5 0x55627b9c9ba7 #6 0x55627b9bdbb2 #7 0x55627b9bd4f7 #8 0x55627ba107b6 #9 0x55627b9bbcbf #10 0x55627b9bca81 #11 0x55627bf2ca64 #12 0x55627bf2f951 #13 0x55627bf1921e #14 0x55627bf3051e #15 0x55627beffbe0 #16 0x55627bf539b8 #17 0x55627bf53b88 #18 0x55627bf654de #19 0x7f5096c9caa4 #20 0x7f5096d29c6c

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Native click failed on Delete Account; trying JS click fallback.
kw.arg: Native click failed on Delete Account; trying JS click fallback.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Account deletion confirmation not visible; continuing without failing teardown.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Delete Account link not found, skipping cleanup.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Deletes the current account if logged in.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.
